title: Chiozz
description: A beauty and health e-commerce platform featuring complex third-party integrations including Google Maps, Google Places, OAuth authentication, Stripe payments, and the KLIA Ekspres API for a seamless Malaysian market experience.

title: Ecogrocer
description: A grocery e-commerce aggregator with an integrated food bank donation system, allowing consumers to shop for groceries or donate excess food to nearby NGOs and food banks. Includes a full CMS for merchants, food bank admins, and platform admins.

title: Calvary Church
description: A modern church website for Calvary Church Malaysia, built with Nuxt 4 and featuring content management via Nuxt Content and smooth UI interactions powered by Swiper web components.

title: HealthOpt
description: A clinic management system with a built-in staff burnout tracking module. Built on a decoupled frontend/backend architecture, with CI/CD pipelines, Docker containerisation, and AWS EC2 deployment ensuring continuous delivery.
